data:
## Achievements

Skills I've unlocked through consistent training:

- **Muscle Up** — explosive pull into a full dip above the bar
- **Handstand** — freestanding, controlled balance
- **Full Planche** — body parallel to the ground, fully extended
- **Front Lever** — horizontal hold on the bar, body straight
- **L-Sit** — legs parallel to the ground, held on parallettes or floor

## Current Goals

Skills I'm actively working toward:

- **One Arm Handstand** — freestanding balance on a single arm
- **Full Planche Push Up** — full range of motion push up in planche position
- **Touch Front Lever** — front lever with a touch-and-go pull to vertical
